scripts.test: npm run clean && GREP='@sanitycheck' GREP_INVERT=true wdio run wdio.conf.js
scripts.test:smoketest: npm run clean && GREP='@smoketest' wdio run wdio.conf.js
scripts.test:browserstack: npm run clean && wdio run wdio.browserstack.conf.js
scripts.test:local: npm run clean && GREP='@envonly|@sanitycheck' GREP_INVERT=true wdio run wdio.local.conf.js
scripts.test:local:debug: npm run clean && GREP='@envonly|@sanitycheck' GREP_INVERT=true DEBUG=true wdio run wdio.local.conf.js
scripts.test:local:grep: npm run clean && wdio run wdio.local.conf.js
scripts.test:local:sanity: npm run clean && GREP='@sanitycheck' wdio run wdio.local.conf.js
scripts.test:github: npm run clean && GREP='@envonly|@sanitycheck' GREP_INVERT=true wdio run wdio.github.conf.js
scripts.test:github:admin: npm run clean && GREP='@envonly|@sanitycheck' GREP_INVERT=true wdio run wdio.github.conf.js --spec './test/specs/admin/**/*.e2e.js'
scripts.test:github:frontend: npm run clean && GREP='@envonly|@sanitycheck' GREP_INVERT=true wdio run wdio.github.conf.js --exclude './test/specs/admin/**/*.e2e.js'
scripts.test:github:browserstack: npm run clean && wdio run wdio.github.browserstack.conf.js
scripts.setup:husky: node -e "try { (await import('husky')).default() } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND') throw e }" --input-type module
